title: ferray-random: no SFC64 (Small Fast Chaotic) BitGenerator
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy provides 4 BitGenerators: PCG64, Philox, MT19937, SFC64. ferray-random has 3: Xoshiro256**, PCG64, Philox. Missing: SFC64 (which is NumPy's fastest generator and good for non-parallel use) and MT19937 (legacy, only needed for backward compatibility). SFC64 would be a useful addition as it's the fastest option for single-threaded generation. Xoshiro256** is a good default but SFC64 is even faster.
